3161610.name: Numberx
3161610.description:
ENHANCE YOUR MENTAL QUICKNESS

Fit the blocks being careful about the priority of which one are you controlling, and complete rightfull maths expressions or you will be blocked till the end. You can discard blocks using your lifes, while restoring them by completing expressions.

RANK UP AND BE REACH THE TOP

All gamemodes have a unique leaderboard, so masterize each one and try to appear on the rest's leaderboards!

PLAY DIFFERENT MODES

  • NORMAL
The normal gamemode, just try to not get blocked.

  • BLOCKSTORM
All the lines have blocks falling from the top at a range of time, be quick or it will end quickly.

  • GIANT
Just, why not GIANT blocks?

  • INVERSE
Imagine you reverse your computer, i do it for you.

  • BREAK LOGIC
Just forget all you learnt about maths, or better, just reverse your logic and, you have it!
3161610.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
